steps.description: Click on the "Declarative Agent" option within the "New Project" dropdown menu to create an agent using instructions and actions.
Click on the "General Teams Agent" option within the dropdown menu titled "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" at coordinates (474, 210).
Click on the dropdown option "Tab" under the "Teams Capability" menu in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click on the "Default folder" dropdown input field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select or specify the project directory.
Press the F1 key to open the Command Palette in the Visual Studio Code interface, with the Explorer panel active and the "VSCAUSE_APP_MEKQ6" workspace loaded.
Type the text 'Deploy' into the Visual Studio Code command palette input box at the top center of the interface.
Click the "Deploy" command option within the Microsoft 365 Actions: Deploy dropdown in the Visual Studio Code command palette.
Click the "Deploy" button in the confirmation dialog asking "Do you want to deploy resources in dev environment?" within the Visual Studio Code interface.
